svg.title: Ship Fuel Consumption MLOps Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: Complete MLOps pipeline from data ingestion to deployment including MLflow, DVC, CI/CD, FastAPI and Streamlit

sendPrompt('What files are stored in GitHub in this project?')
